game_instances.input: Why is the sky blue? Answer in two sentences.
What languages are related to Hungarian? Just enumerate them, no explanations.
Explain the global role of the USA in three sentences. Answer in the style of Gollum from Lord of the Rings.
Explain in one sentence the most important aspects of the planet Kashyyl. You are Chewbacca from Star Wars, and have to answer in his style.
